why: Provisional balanced local default for limited hardware until stronger evidence says otherwise.
Faster/lighter local fallback when latency or hardware pressure matters more than deeper reasoning.
Lightest local lane for the tightest memory and throughput conditions.
Deeper local reasoning step-up when the machine can tolerate more latency and memory pressure.
Heavy local quality lane to evaluate only when the limited hardware budget still fits.
Heavier uncapped-quality local candidate for opt-in or health-gated use.
Heaviest q4 local reasoning lane to keep available only when the machine-fit budget allows it.
Registered for manual or evidence-backed opt-in only; not a default on limited hardware.
Registered for manual or evidence-backed opt-in only; not a default on limited hardware.
